clinician_email.description: Email of clinician reporting the event

person_completing_form.description: Name of person who completed the form

date_became_aware.description: Date site team member became aware of event

is_sae.description: Is this a Serious Adverse Event

is_aesi.description: Is this an Adverse Event of Special Interest

sae_action_taken.description: Action taken during task and adverse event

status.description: Status of the adverse event report

location_id.description: Reference to the location where appointment takes place

start_time.description: Start date and time of the appointment

end_time.description: End date and time of the appointment

description.description: A brief description of the assessment

instructions.description: Detailed instructions on how to perform the assessment

unit_of_measure.description: The unit for the score (e.g., seconds, repetitions, score)

contraindications.description: Conditions or situations where the assessment should not be used

conditions_indicated.description: List of conditions this assessment is indicated for

search_tags.description: Tags to help with searching for the assessment

references.description: Citations or sources for the assessment

questions.description: Array of questions for questionnaire-based assessments

is_questionnaire.description: Whether this is a questionnaire-based assessment (vs performance-based)

has_test_runner.description: Quality check: Has a test runner

results_add_to_soap.description: Quality check: Results add correctly to SOAP notes

has_instructions.description: Quality check: Has instructions to clinician

org_id.description: Organization ID of the user who submitted

additional_referrals.description: Additional referral sources for multi-funded clients

other_healthcare_providers.description: Other healthcare providers involved in care

my_aged_care_provider_name.description: My Aged Care provider organization name

my_aged_care_case_manager.description: My Aged Care case manager/coordinator name

my_aged_care_functional_goals.description: Functional goals from My Aged Care plan

my_aged_care_service_types.description: Types of services approved under My Aged Care

dva_pcp_history.description: History of DVA Patient Care Plans with goals

aged_care_coordinator_name.description: Care coordinator or case manager name

gp_referrer_name.description: Name of GP who made referral

apss_completed.description: Whether APSS Stage 1 has been completed

apss_q3_faint_dizzy.description: Q3: Faint, dizzy, or lose balance

apss_q4_asthma.description: Q4: Asthma attack in last 12 months

apss_q5_diabetes_control.description: Q5: Diabetes blood sugar control issues

apss_q7_activity_light_freq.description: Q7: Light activity frequency per week

apss_q7_activity_light_duration.description: Q7: Light activity duration per week (minutes)

apss_q7_activity_moderate_freq.description: Q7: Moderate activity frequency per week

apss_q7_activity_moderate_duration.description: Q7: Moderate activity duration per week (minutes)

apss_q7_activity_vigorous_freq.description: Q7: Vigorous activity frequency per week

apss_q7_activity_vigorous_duration.description: Q7: Vigorous activity duration per week (minutes)

apss_q7_total_minutes.description: Q7: Total weighted minutes of activity per week

apss_stage2_completed.description: Whether APSS Stage 2 has been completed

apss_s2_family_history.description: Stage 2: Family history of heart disease

apss_s2_family_history_records.description: Array of family members with heart disease history

apss_s2_smoking.description: Stage 2: Currently smoking or quit in last 6 months

apss_s2_medications_list.description: List of current medical conditions requiring medication

apss_s2_pregnancy.description: Pregnant or given birth in last 12 months

apss_s2_musculoskeletal_issues.description: Diagnosed muscle, bone, tendon, ligament issues

privacy_consent.description: Whether client has provided privacy consent

assessment_consent.description: Whether client has provided assessment consent

pricing_explained.description: Whether pricing schedule was explained and agreed to

cancellation_policy_agreed.description: Whether client has agreed to cancellation policy

appointment_id.description: Reference to appointment where assessment was performed

barriers.description: Identified barriers to rehabilitation during assessment

normative_comparison.description: How result compares to normative data

is_flagged.description: Whether result is flagged for attention

source.description: How this assessment was created (live test or uploaded from historical document)

pain_level.description: Current pain level for this condition (0-10)

org_id.description: Organization this nutrition plan belongs to

current_eating_patterns.description: Client's current eating habits and patterns

general_advice_given.description: General healthy eating advice aligned with Australian Dietary Guidelines

sample_meal_plan.description: Sample daily eating pattern showing how to meet recommended serves

behavioral_strategies.description: Behavior change strategies for eating habits

referred_to_dietitian.description: Whether client was referred to an APD

referred_to_diabetes_educator.description: Whether client was referred to diabetes educator

energy_unit_preference.description: Client's preferred energy unit (Australian standard is kJ)

episode_number.description: Sequential episode number for this client

status.description: Whether this is the current active episode

funding_source.description: Funding source at time of this episode

referral_source.description: Referral source at time of episode

client_goals.description: Client goals snapshot at time of episode

client_snapshot.description: Full snapshot of the client record at time of onboarding completion (includes personal info, APSS answers, consents, digital signature)

apss_snapshot.description: Snapshot of all APSS field values at time of onboarding

signed_policy_id.description: ID of the clinic policy signed at this episode

signed_policy_name.description: Name of the clinic policy signed at this episode

signed_policy_version.description: Version label of the policy signed at this episode

signed_policy_snapshot.description: Full snapshot of the policy terms that were signed

medical_conditions_snapshot.description: Snapshot of medical conditions at time of onboarding

report_data.description: The complete report data in JSON format

html_content.description: HTML content of the report for quick viewing

is_active.description: Whether this is the currently active policy shown to clients

show_primary_consent.description: Show primary consent for assessment and treatment

show_privacy_consent.description: Show privacy and data storage consent

notes.description: Internal notes about this policy version

description.description: Detailed instructions on how to perform the exercise

contraindications.description: Conditions where exercise should be avoided

user_role.description: Role of user at time of acceptance

ip_address.description: IP address at time of acceptance

is_primary.description: Whether this is the user's primary organization

org_id.description: Organization this SOAP note belongs to

appointment_id.description: Reference to the appointment (optional if SOAP note created independently)

location_id.description: Reference to the location where session took place

note_date.description: The date of the note, usually matches the appointment date

session_location.description: Location where the session took place (deprecated, use location_id)

note_name.description: Custom name for the SOAP note (e.g., PCP Session 1, ECR Final Review)

subjective.description: Subjective part of the SOAP note

compliance.description: Structured compliance / home program adherence data (analytics-safe)

notes.description: Free text notes (clinical record only, not for analytics)

objective.description: Objective part of the SOAP note

assessment.description: Assessment part of the SOAP note

plan.description: Plan part of the SOAP note

plan_attachments.description: Documents attached to the plan section

full_transcript.description: Complete audio transcription of the session recording

session_audio_url.description: URL to the recorded audio file of the session (deprecated, use session_audio_urls)

session_audio_urls.description: Array of recorded audio files for the session

published_date.description: When the note was first published

published_by.description: Email of the user who published the note

history.description: A log of changes made to the note

report_type.description: Internal report type key (e.g. gp_summary, workcover_pmp)

date_range_start.description: Start of the report date range

date_range_end.description: End of the report date range

assessment_ids.description: IDs of assessments included in this report

section_content.description: Key-value map of section name to content text

active_sections.description: Ordered list of sections included in this report

report_html.description: Full rendered HTML of the report

last_updated.description: When this protocol was last updated

rejection_reason.description: Reason for account rejection if applicable

approved_by.description: Email of admin who approved the account

last_active.description: Last time the user was active in the system
